periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 5am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. Low around 64, with temperatures rising to around 66 overnight. South southwest wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 73, with temperatures falling to around 64 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 42, with temperatures rising to around 44 overnight. Northwest wind 2 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 66. West wind 2 to 6 mph.

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 48. South southwest wind around 6 mph.

periods.name: Monday

periods.name: Monday Night
periods.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. South southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.
